Global Variable# FFERR_GENERIC

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_GENERIC: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_generic#Discussion)

An undetermined error occurred.
